scripts.reset-data: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const d='./data';if(fs.existsSync(p.join(d,'constraints.md')))fs.unlinkSync(p.join(d,'constraints.md'));const s=p.join(d,'sops');if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>fs.unlinkSync(p.join(s,f)));fs.rmdirSync(s)}console.log('Data reset. Fresh user state.')"
